use tokio::sync::{mpsc, oneshot};
use std::sync::Arc;

struct Server {
    db: Arc<Db>,
}

impl Server {
    async fn handle_request(&self, req: Request) -> Response {
        let (tx, rx) = oneshot::channel();
        let (event_tx, event_rx) = mpsc::channel(32);
        tokio::spawn(process_with_events(self.db.clone(), req.clone(), event_tx));
        tokio::spawn(collect_events(event_rx, tx));
        let result = rx.await.unwrap();
        Response { body: result }
    }
}

async fn process_with_events(_db: Arc<Db>, _req: Request, _events: mpsc::Sender<Event>) {
    todo!()
}

async fn collect_events(mut rx: mpsc::Receiver<Event>, tx: oneshot::Sender<String>) {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    while let Some(event) = rx.recv().await {
        results.push(format!("{event:?}"));
    }
    let _ = tx.send(results.join(","));
}

struct Request { body: String }
impl Clone for Request {
    fn clone(&self) -> Self { Self { body: self.body.clone() } }
}
struct Response { body: String }
struct Db;
struct Event;
